Methodology

Composite blends 4 pillars (Football, Index, Athleticism, Physical) versus the Premier League benchmark pool (PL Floor methodology v6).

Sell-on score reweights composite by age curve and trajectory (younger + rising → higher).

Fit score applies a Shakhtar style premium for Brazilian, Eredivisie, Belgian and Eastern European pipelines.

Priority = 0.40·Composite + 0.25·Fit + 0.25·Sell-on + 0.10·Projection.
